creator: ooonea@gmail.com
text:
I'm on FreeBSD 13.0-p5. I installed the port graphics/drm-kmod with the command pkg install drm-kmod. The version of the package is g20190710_1. My graphics card is a Vega 8 (uses amdgpu). After installing xorg and xfce4, if I give the command vainfo in the terminal emulator, I get this error: https://termbin.com/xoix
It seems to me that this way I don't have support for video acceleration. 
Similar to https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=250325.
